narrative:
Precinct Adams West & Gettysburg (precinct in Darke County) has 1,070 registered voters, with 49.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.1 percentage points.
